since_last: 33% of 100 AI names green; AI Platforms, Internet & AdTech leads +2.50%; AI bubble risk 49 Neutral.

cards.headline: The tape: broad selling, 33% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX +0.33% · BTC +0.07% · Gold +0.28% · Nasdaq100 -0.32%. 33% of 100 AI names are green — broad selling. AI Platforms, Internet & AdTech is doing the heavy lifting at +2.50%.

cards.headline: AI Platforms, Internet & AdTech leads, Chip Equipment & AI Hardware lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Platforms, Internet & AdTech at +2.50%; weakest is Chip Equipment & AI Hardware at -4.77%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: DELL is the standout at -11.64%
cards.body: Leaders: BABA +5.77%, POWL +4.37%, AAPL +3.99%, ORCL +3.51%, GOOGL +3.40%. Laggards: DELL -11.64%, SKHY -9.98%, MU -7.37%, MRVL -6.70%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) -0.43% at $135.49
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is -0.43% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 49 — Neutral
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 49/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
